title: Simple Vanilla +
description: A Vanilla+ modpack that enhances Minecraft with quality-of-life improvements, subtle visual upgrades, and better performance – keeping the game close to its roots while making it smoother and more enjoyable.
body:
# 🌳 Simple Vanilla +

## 📖 Description
This modpack was created for players who love the **classic Minecraft experience**, but want it to feel a little more **optimized, beautiful, and smooth**.  
You won’t find any overwhelming new mechanics – instead, this pack focuses on polishing and improving the vanilla game.

---

## ✨ Features

- **Vanilla+ Gameplay**  
  Subtle improvements and additions that stay true to the original Minecraft style.  

- **Quality of Life**  
  Mods that improve performance, add useful shortcuts, and make gameplay more convenient.  

- **Visual Enhancements**  
  Better lighting, textures, and atmosphere while keeping the game’s original charm.  

- **Simple & Lightweight**  
  Designed to run smoothly, whether you’re playing solo or with friends.  

---

## 🎮 Perfect For
Players who want to keep Minecraft **close to its roots**, but with:  
- extra polish  
- modern conveniences  
- and a fresh, immersive look

---

## 🙌 Credits
- **Mojang Studios** – for creating Minecraft  
- **Mod Developers** – for their amazing mods that make this pack possible  
- **[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)** – for amazing resource packs and data packs that inspired this modpack
